name: Connect Four
description: Align four of your pawns side-by-side on the same rank.
flavor_text: Wrong board game, but we respect the geometry.

name: The Botez Gambit
description: Blunder your Queen entirely cleanly without compensation.

name: The Bongcloud Attack
description: Play the Bongcloud Opening (1. e4 e5 2. Ke2 or black equivalent).
flavor_text: Ah, a player of true culture and refined taste.

name: Disrespect Acknowledged
description: Have an opponent play the Bongcloud against you.
flavor_text: Did they just... move their King on move 2?

name: The Last Men Standing
description: Reach a board state where only the two Kings remain.
flavor_text: A duel stripped of all armies. Just two monarchs staring at each other.

name: The Century Mark
description: Win a game that lasts longer than 120 moves.
flavor_text: Both players aged visibly during this encounter.

name: The Centaur
description: Win a game without committing a single inaccuracy, mistake, or blunder.
flavor_text: Are you sure you don't have Stockfish running in another tab?

name: Snatching Defeat from the Jaws of Victory
description: Lose on time in a completely winning position (evaluation > +5.0 in your favor).
flavor_text: You had them on the ropes, but the clock stops for no one.
